name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently — totally no pressure, life gets busy and we get it. We just wanted you to know the door is always open here at Bright Smile Dental.

If and when you're ready to come back, here's 20% off your next visit:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days — just mention it (or enter it at checkout) when you book.

And if something about your last experience wasn't quite right, we'd genuinely love to hear it. Hit reply — a real person reads every note, and we'd rather know than not.

Take care of those teeth either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hey {{firstName}}, quick note from Bright Smile Dental — your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
